user.title: User
user.description: Represents a user in the system

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user

displayName.description: The name shown to other users

photoURL.description: URL to the user's profile picture

lastSeen.description: When the user was last active

chat.title: Chat
chat.description: A conversation between multiple users or a user and AI

participants.description: List of user UIDs participating in the chat

lastMessage.description: Snippet of the last message sent

updatedAt.description: Last time the chat was updated

type.description: Whether it's a human-human or human-ai chat

message.title: Message
message.description: A single message within a chat

chatId.description: ID of the chat this message belongs to

senderId.description: UID of the user who sent the message (or 'ai')

content.description: The text content of the message
